call_digest.call_type: Coaching / Testimony / Spiritual Deep-Dive - Number Two
main_themes: The 'Garden of Eden' Reframe: We are always in the garden, we just keep eating the apple.
God's 'Historical Gusto': Seeing God's hand in history and geography.
The Strength of Weakness: Letting God carry the cross when you are physically broken.
Professional Skill Redemption: How 'evil' skills are redeemed for the Kingdom.
emotional_peaks: Augusto's raw peace during a near-death surfing experience.
The 'Divine Coincidence' of the gardener-turned-Orthodox priest full-circle moment.
Andre's story of deleting everything to serve God.
top_objections: Objection: 'I feel weird/anxious about praying for/approaching others.' (Growth Anxiety)
Objection: 'I'm a massive sinner, why would God want me?' (The Heartbreak Punch)
top_truth_flips: We aren't waiting for God; we're in the Garden right now, just distracted by 'apple-picking.'
Anxiety isn't always bad; 'Growth Anxiety' is a test of courage.

nuggets.idea_one_liner: You aren't trying to find the Garden of Eden; you're living in it, you just won't stop eating the apple.
nuggets.why_it_hits: Massive paradigm shift. Peace is a current choice, not a future destination.
nuggets.proof_quote: I would almost argue that we do have, we are in the Garden of Eden, constantly eating the apple. Because I can tap into God at any time. ... We choose to be stressed, rushed, anxious, tired. That is us eating our apples.
hook_angles: Welcome to the Garden of Eden. Why are you still eating the apple?
Heaven on earth isn't a place. It's a choice you're currently refusing.

nuggets.idea_one_liner: If your anxiety is about your own growth, it's a test; if it's based on fear, it's demonic.
nuggets.why_it_hits: Simple discernment filter for internal states.
nuggets.proof_quote: If there's a tinge of anxiety that's not an anxiety based on growth, but an anxiety based on fear, it's demonic, pure and simple.

value_equation.dream_outcome: Clarity on which thoughts to follow.

hook_angles: Is your anxiety from God or the Devil?
Why 'Scared' is sometimes the best way to feel.

objection_bank.objection_text: I'm afraid of what God will ask me to give up.
objection_bank.underlying_belief: God's plan is less satisfying than my own.
objection_bank.underlying_fear: If I give up control, I will be miserable.
objection_bank.counter_truth_angle: Peace comes from surrender. As soon as you release the need, God often opens the door to abundance.
objection_bank.transcript_proof_quote: I released the need. And as a result of it, they continue to come.

top_5_nuggets.one_liner: Stop eating the apple and enjoy the Garden.

creator_notes.tone: Vlog/Adventure spirit mixed with deep theology. (Reprocessed Run Number Two).
